name: Kingdom of Zeal
description: A magical floating kingdom suspended in the sky above the planet in 12,000 BC. The kingdom is powered by energy drawn from Lavos deep beneath the earth's surface. Its citizens have abandoned the surface world and live in luxury, practicing advanced magic and technology. The architecture is grand and crystalline, with towers and spires that glimmer in the eternal twilight. The common people work in the depths while the enlightened ones live in perpetual comfort above.
